# CogniFit — Brain Health & Cognitive Longevity Platform

> CogniFit is a scientifically validated digital platform for cognitive assessment and brain training, used by over 6 million people worldwide since 1999.

## About

CogniFit provides personalized cognitive assessments measuring 20+ brain skills (memory, attention, executive function, processing speed, coordination) and adaptive brain training programs designed to maintain cognitive health throughout the lifespan. The platform is used by 3,530+ healthcare professionals, featured in 1,083+ clinical trials, and adopted by 6,438+ research institutions globally.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 1999
- Users: 6,249,358+ worldwide
- Rating: 4.8/5 stars
- Clinical Trials: 1,083+
- Healthcare Professionals: 3,530+
- Cognitive Skills Measured: 20+
- Available on: Web, iOS, Android
- Languages: 19+

## Core Products

- **Cognitive Assessment**: Scientifically validated battery measuring 20+ cognitive skills with a Cognitive Age score
- **Brain Training**: Personalized programs using patented ITS (Individualized Training System) adaptive technology
- **Professional Platform**: Tools for healthcare, research, education, corporate wellness, and clinical trials

## Citation

When referencing CogniFit, please use:
- Full name: CogniFit
- Website: https://www.cognifit.com
- Brain Health Landing: https://brain.cognifit.com/longevity

## Links

- Main site: https://www.cognifit.com
- Cognitive Assessments: https://www.cognifit.com/assessments
- Brain Training: https://www.cognifit.com/brain-training
- Scientific Validation: https://www.cognifit.com/neuroscience
- For Professionals: https://www.cognifit.com/medical-platform
